category_title: Adolescents positioned as struggling readers who disengage from standardized tasks but engage with self-selected literature
minimal_context: The student and tutor are in a bookstore looking at the Babysitter Club book series to select books for independent reading.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is the Babysitter Club book series. You better read them.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I've never really been interested in those books. They just looked boring to me.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just pick out some books to start reading.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: You're really going to get me these books? I'm probably not even going to read them.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Read the back cover and see what it says.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Reads the back cover) This looks like this is not my type and I really don't care for this one.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is the Babysitter Club book series. You better read them.

STUDENT: I've never really been interested in those books. They just looked boring to me.

TUTOR: Just pick out some books to start reading.

STUDENT: You're really going to get me these books? I'm probably not even going to read them.

TUTOR: Read the back cover and see what it says.

STUDENT: (Reads the back cover) This looks like this is not my type and I really don't care for this one.

context.materials: Diverse genres including teen romances set in urban communities, graphic novels, biographies, and specific series like Babysitter Club or Gossip Girls
context.social_setting: One-on-one interaction with an adult (mother, Big Sister, or teacher)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When an adult gives her a specific book series and tells her 'You better read them'
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Reads each book's back cover, concludes 'This looks like this is not my type', and expresses skepticism saying 'I'm probably not even going to read them'
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Never really been interested in those books; felt they just looked boring
related_quotes: This looks like this is not my type and I really don ’t care for this one.
I ’m probably not even going to read them.

behavior_patterns.condition: When evaluating books that do not match her interests
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Reads the back cover and immediately dismisses the book as boring or not her type
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Lack of interest and feeling that the books are boring
related_quotes: I’ve never really been interested in those books. They just looked boring to me.
